report.summary: The `widgets.list()` example uses the v1 response shape; v2 wraps results in `data`.
report.details:
The page still shows the v1 shape:

```json
[{"id": "…"}]
```

The live API (v2, since 2025-09) returns:

```json
{"data": [{"id": "…"}], "next_cursor": null}
```

evidence.text:
const widgets = await client.widgets.list();
widgets.map(w => w.id); // TypeError
"widgets.list() returns an array of widget objects"

report.suggested_fix:
Update the example to destructure `data` (and mention `next_cursor`):

```js
const { data: widgets } = await client.widgets.list();
```

task_context.task_summary: Implement a Widgets listing screen following the docs example.
task_context.transcript_excerpt: I tried to call widgets.list() per the docs, but the returned value is an object, not an array, so .map crashed.
